case_title: JORDAN SMOKE SHOP & GROCERY VS PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,875.00 FILED BY JORDAN SMOKE SHOP & GROCERY AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S NAIK, BIPIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAIK, BIPIN

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-05-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-30-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER TRIAL. THE AMOUNT REQUESTED BY PLAINTIFF IN THIS CASE IS AMENDED FROM $4875 TO $5000 PER ORDER OF THIS COURT. THE DEFENDANTS HAD NOTICE OF ADDITIONAL MONEY FROM PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
# 813513 OF $2500. CASE # 813513 WAS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE DUE TO A SPLIT CLAIM.
DEFENDANT'S STIPULATION AS TO DEFENDANT'S LEASE FILED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-30-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-06-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR DEFT TO SUBMIT PROOF OF ROOF REPAIR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JORDAN SMOKE SHOP & GROCERY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S NAIK, BIPIN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,022.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S NAIK, BIPIN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28012, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JORDAN SMOKE SHOP & GROCERY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, JAGRUTIBON S JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28012 ON 01/05/06. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO CARRY ITS BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE QUESTION OF FAULT FOR THE LEAKS. EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
